if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND c.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND c.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdProdContent :: selectById */ c.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , cd_pct.code_label AS content_type_cd_nm FROM pd_prod_content c LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = c.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = c.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pct ON cd_pct.code_grp = 'PROD_CONTENT_TYPE' AND cd_pct.code_value = c.content_type_cd WHERE c.prod_content_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdProdContent :: selectList */ c.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , cd_pct.code_label AS content_type_cd_nm FROM pd_prod_content c LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = c.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = c.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pct ON cd_pct.code_grp = 'PROD_CONTENT_TYPE' AND cd_pct.code_value = c.content_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdProdContent :: selectPageList */ c.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , cd_pct.code_label AS content_type_cd_nm FROM pd_prod_content c LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = c.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = c.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pct ON cd_pct.code_grp = 'PROD_CONTENT_TYPE' AND cd_pct.code_value = c.content_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(c.*) /* base.ec.pd :: PdProdContent :: selectPageCount */ FROM pd_prod_content c
